queries.question: Provide a list of all news articles and also provide a list of feature articles of 1,000 words.
queries.sql:
SELECT Articles.Title 
FROM Articles JOIN WordCounts ON Articles.word_count = WordCounts.column
WHERE Articles.Written_journalism = "News Article" OR Articles.Written_journalism = "Feature Article" AND WordCounts.column = "1,000 words"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?wordcounts a :WordCounts .
  ?articles p:word_count ?word_count_l .
  ?wordcounts p:column ?column_r .
  ?articles p:title ?title .
  ?articles p:Written_journalism ?written_journalism_w .
  ?articles p:Written_journalism ?written_journalism_w2 .
  ?wordcounts p:column ?column_w .
  FILTER(STR(?word_count_l) = STR(?column_r))
  FILTER((STR(?written_journalism_w) = "News Article" || (STR(?written_journalism_w2) = "Feature Article" && STR(?column_w) = "1,000 words")))
}

queries.question: Show me news articles and feature articles of 1,000 words.
queries.sql:
SELECT Articles.Title 
FROM Articles JOIN WordCounts ON Articles.word_count = WordCounts.column
WHERE (Articles.Written_journalism = "News Article" OR Articles.Written_journalism = "Feature Article") AND WordCounts.column = "1,000 words"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?wordcounts a :WordCounts .
  ?articles p:word_count ?word_count_l .
  ?wordcounts p:column ?column_r .
  ?articles p:title ?title .
  ?articles p:Written_journalism ?written_journalism_w .
  ?articles p:Written_journalism ?written_journalism_w2 .
  ?wordcounts p:column ?column_w .
  FILTER(STR(?word_count_l) = STR(?column_r))
  FILTER((((STR(?written_journalism_w) = "News Article" || STR(?written_journalism_w2) = "Feature Article")) && STR(?column_w) = "1,000 words"))
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show me news articles and feature articles of 1,000 words.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/journalism/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  low: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?wordcounts a :WordCounts .
  ?articles p:word_count ?word_count_l .
  ?wordcounts p:column ?column_r .
  ?articles p:title ?title .
  ?articles p:Written_journalism ?written_journalism_w .
  ?articles p:Written_journalism ?written_journalism_w2 .
  ?wordcounts p:column ?column_w .
  FILTER(STR(?word_count_l) = STR(?column_r))
  FILTER((STR(?written_journalism_w) = "News Article" || (STR(?written_journalism_w2) = "Feature Article" && STR(?column_w) = "1,000 words")))
} }
  high: { SELECT ?title WHERE {
  ?articles a :Articles .
  ?wordcounts a :WordCounts .
  ?articles p:word_count ?word_count_l .
  ?wordcounts p:column ?column_r .
  ?articles p:title ?title .
  ?articles p:Written_journalism ?written_journalism_w .
  ?articles p:Written_journalism ?written_journalism_w2 .
  ?wordcounts p:column ?column_w .
  FILTER(STR(?word_count_l) = STR(?column_r))
  FILTER((((STR(?written_journalism_w) = "News Article" || STR(?written_journalism_w2) = "Feature Article")) && STR(?column_w) = "1,000 words"))
} }
}
